notes: Exact firm query should rank Goldman variants at the very top.
Single-token typo rescue should still recover Goldman near the top.
Firm + geography + AML should put the live Irish Coinbase action first.
Transposition typo should still recover Coinbase Europe.
Firm-led AML controls query should surface Barclays in the first page, ideally top 5.
Geography + sector + AML should find the Irish crypto enforcement quickly.
Regulator-scoped governance query should keep FCA rows at the top.
CFT theme queries should rank obviously AML/CFT-related regulators high.
Country-led broad compliance query should prefer German regulator results.
Regulator token should keep SEBI rows near the top for AML-related results.
Low-signal stopword queries should be rejected cleanly.
Nonsense queries should return zero results rather than noisy broad matches.
